attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_KEY
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.TRANSACTION_DTM
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.SS_CD
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.PROCESS_DT
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.BOOKINGS_PCT
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.SPLIT_PCT
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.TRADE_IN_AMT
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DD_AH_BK_SALES_REP_NUM
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DD_AH_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DD_AH_RMA_FLG
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_AH_BKG_PCT
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_AH_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_AH_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_AH_REVENUE_FLG
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DD_AH_OVERLAY_FLG
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_AH_IC_REVENUE_FLG
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_AH_CHARGES_FLG
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_AH_MISC_FLG
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_AH_ACQUISITION_FLG
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_AH_SERVICE_FLG
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DD_AH_CORP_BKG_FLAG
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DD_AH_CANCELLED_FLG
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_AH_COMP_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_AH_COMP_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_AH_COMP_COST_USD_AMT
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_AH_EXTENDED_QTY
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DD_AH_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DD_AH_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DD_AH_COMP_US_STD_PRICE_AMT
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DD_AH_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DD_AH_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DD_AH_SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DD_AH_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DD_AH_PRODUCT_KEY
 , W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,USER
 ,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)  ) 
 ,USER 
 ,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)  )   
 ,W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG     /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/     
 ,W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/  
 ,W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
 ,W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
 ,W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
 ,W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
  ,W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */
 ,W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /* NRS PI3 Change */
/*  ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY18 */
, W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   
,W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
/* END Q2FY18 XAAS */
/* ADDED AS PART OF ACV */
,-999 AS ERP_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY
,-999 AS XAAS_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY
,'N' AS TRANSACTIONAL_ACV_FLG
,'N' AS HISTORY_FLG
,0.00 AS DV_ORIG_AH_CMP_NET_PRC_USD_AMT

 FROM
  $$WORKDB.W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD
  
 WHERE DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_KEY NOT IN
 (SELECT DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_KEY FROM 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD)
